programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Smashed and Sauced
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's getting saucy with gourmet pork banh mi pizza in Minneapolis; a neighborhood staple in Boston is serving up lights-out lobster rolls; a Massachusetts gastropub is plating mushroom poutine and onion smash burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into pork dumplings from a husband-and-wife team in Sacramento, Calif.; a Palm Beach Gardens, Fla. Bistro is mixing up a meat sauce; a mom-and-pop shop in San Jose, Calif. Serves up black bean burgers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Boise, Idaho, an empanada emporium and a stick-to-your-ribs spot are both serving up off-the-hook sandwiches; a funky joint in Savannah, Ga., is putting out real deal wood-fired pizza and bagels.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into a world of cultural cuisine with indigenous recipes; fry bread and pozole in Phoenix, Ariz.; authentic Argentine specialties in Boulder, Colo.; a kabob spot in Memphis, Tenn., marinates meats with Ethiopian flavor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A Los Angeles spot dishes out El Salvadorian with a twist, while an Oregon food cart serves up authentic Indian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes from strudel to noodle; in Boulder, Colo., a boho joint serves sweet strudel; Alberta's next-level Nepalese; in Memphis, Tenn., a couple brings big flavor to killer noodles.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri catches up with lights-out lengua at a mom-and-pop taco spot in Phoenix; a meatless butcher in Minneapolis puts their plant-based stamp on a huli-huli rib panini.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs into hearty handfuls of major flavor; he grabs pizza at a funky joint in Memphis, Tenn.; tasty tacos at an authentic Mexican spot in Calgary, Alberta; elevated empanadas at an Argentinian place in St. Simons Island, Ga.

programme.title: Jane Seymour, Kate Walsh share their skin secrets
programme.desc: Crepe Erase Ultra visibly transforms your skin with 9 super hydrators! Tune in to see how Jane Seymour and Kate Walsh keep their skin so smooth. Treat and repair the look of crepey skin.Shop at CrepeErase.com.

programme.title: Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: Transform your bath affordably in just one day!

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actor Christine Baranski visits Ina Garten's barn to talk Broadway breaks, love at first sight and living the Italian dream; Ina makes Maple-Oatmeal Scones, and they take a culinary trip to Italy by cooking Weeknight Bolognese and Roasted Broccolini.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Journalist Michael Barbaro joins Ina Garten for Spicy Hermit Bars and conversation about storytelling tactics, style and the success of his podcast "The Daily"; Ina shows Michael an updated Chicken Marbella that's perfect for easy entertaining.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites a bunch of friends over to reminisce while cooking up her version of nostalgic foods; she makes mini golden beef pockets filled with spiced ground beef, lowcountry ramen noodles, delicious dunkers and double berry snack bars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites her friends over for a movie night under the stars with a delicious movie theater-inspired menu: low country muffuletta, shrimp burgers with avocado tartar sauce, fried pickles with chipotle ranch and candy bar popcorn balls.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown cooks up a Derby Day-inspired lunch for an afternoon of horseback riding; the menu includes hot brown sandwiches with roast turkey, a cream cheese ball, a ginger mint julep and, for dessert, Kentucky butter cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown prepares two chicken dinners with sides; she serves tuscan chicken soup, southern-style chicken cordon bleu, spinach and candied walnut salad and fried brussels sprouts with tomato gastrique.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond whips up dishes that can't go wrong, including chocolate sheet cake with vanilla bean frosting, stuffed peppers, simple Tex-Mex chicken spaghetti, and whiskey pot roast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond uses gemelli in truffle mac and cheese and takes lasagna to the next level with pasta rosettes; she tops linguine with cauliflower bolognese and turns wonton wrappers into shortcut cheese ravioli.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks make-ahead savory, sweet and sippable items for brunch parties, including French onion frittata, a one-pan lemon blueberry French toast casserole, glazed cherry almond rolls and a spicy Tex-Mex Bloody Mary.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree is making a well-earned lunch for Ladd and his new cowgirl, Paige, who are out shipping cattle; pasta with pancetta and corn; lemon pepper chopped salad; individual skillet focaccia; easy chocolate orange ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes easy, impressive appetizers, starting with Tex-Mex Sausage Balls; Ree prepares Crostini Two Ways, Mini Lemon Raspberry Bundt Cakes with pink frosting, and juicy Ribeye Bites with Horseradish Mustard Aioli that packs a punch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond updates potluck cookout essentials. Her "Blueberry Crisp Dump Cake" combines two favorites; featuring sides like "Hot Honey Corn," "Maple Bourbon Baked Beans" and "Crunchy Coleslaw" that are sure to be a crowd favorite.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen preps tea party food that's perfect for any celebration; Sunny Anderson whips up her easy asparagus and tomato quiche, Alex Guarnaschelli serves up cornmeal scones, and Geoffrey Zakarian tops off the tea tower with millionaire bars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Recipes that beat the heat while filling you up, including Geoffrey Zakarian's pan bagnat, Alex Guarnaschelli's cantaloupe gazpacho and Jeff Mauro's smoked salmon bagel nachos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri divides six chefs up into teams as they work alone in 10-minute shifts to create a winning plate; the chefs are surprised to learn that their grocery list featuring breakfast sandwich ingredients must be used to make a dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Most married couples consider their kids their babies, but these couples also consider their restaurants their babies.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: On a GGG first, Guy Fieri gives the chefs three turbo-charged games with only 15 to 20 minutes to shop, cook and plate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives food truck families the ultimate road test by challenging each member to shop in a grocery relay race; the remaining two teams make their food truck favorite with the dish style and condiment determined by two spinning truck wheels.

programme.title: 24 in 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: The chefs begin their first shift and try to impress judge Jet Tila.

programme.title: 24 in 24: Last Chef Standing

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Tequila Lime Chicken; Refried Black Beans; Mexican Rice Casserole.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Chicken and beef fajitas; fiesta beans; cinnamon ice cream with cinnamon chips.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: A Tex-Mex feast featuring juicy marinated green chile chicken, spicy taco potatoes, a layered Mexican salad and Key lime pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree cooks Tex-Mex marvels and fills the freezer with family favorites; she makes a big pot of green chili pork stew and a batch of Fiesta Mac and Cheese; her All-Purpose Tex-Mex Veggies go in soft tacos, veggie taco salad and quesadillas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a fiesta feast with "Spicy Tex-Mex Chicken" for tacos, "Charro Style Beans" and "Loaded Guacamole"; she also makes frozen "Blueberry Peach Margaritas," a fruity spin on a favorite cocktail.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Sizzling chicken fajitas; easy chorizo and potato enchiladas with a five-ingredient sauce; spicy shrimp and strawberry mango salsa; tortilla soup; chef Jordan Andino stops by to make a crunchy taco wrap; Mexican-inspired hot fudge sundae.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Celebrating Cinco de Mayo with a menu full of dishes inspired by Mexican drinks; Michelada steak tacos with cerveza pico; chef David Burtka stops by to spice things up with ancho chile chocolate cookies; new ways to top tacos; Paloma chicken wings.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer asks the remaining four chefs to create arctic-themed cakes with a frozen layer; the top two chefs move on to the finale, and the bottom two chefs battle in a sudden-death round, hoping to impress judges Duff Goldman and Molly Yeh.

programme.desc: Ramsay goes to Boston's La Galleria 33 and tries to help the owners turn their failing business around.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Things get personal when two people who know Bobby Flay better than anyone try to beat their boss.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the final three chefs to create a spectacular dessert display inspired by one of three themes; Judges Duff Goldman, Shinmin Li, Jacques Torres, and Sherry Yard decide who will win $50,000 and the title of Ultimate Baking Champion.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Scott Conant makes a deal with Shark Tank's Lori Greiner and pulls a hostile takeover of Bobby Flay's kitchen to make chefs Derrell Smith or Chris Arellanes the boss.
